arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 3-0 win over Stade Brestois in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League knockout play-off last Tuesday at Stade de Roudourou, with Ousmane Dembélé scoring twice. Unless Brest pulls off an unlikely comeback, PSG will face either Barcelona or Liverpool in the Round of 16. However, a recent report suggests the Ligue 1 club is still keen on signing the Nigerian standout. arts.ttl: How Ousmane Dembélé became the new face of Paris Saint-Germain
arts.sum: It's been a wild season for Ousmane Dembélé, as he's swung from being dropped in October to scoring 18 times in his last 12 games to lead new-look, rebuilt PSG forward.
